pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for the build.
Rename the project artifact and name from 'kitchensink' to 'courses' to reflect the new application identity.
Add Spring Data MongoDB starter to enable MongoDB database support.
Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to replace Swagger/Springfox for API documentation in Spring Boot 3.
Remove deprecated springfox-boot-starter and springfox-swagger-ui dependencies incompatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency to ensure validation annotations are available.
Add awaitility library to assist with testing asynchronous jobs.
Add spring-security-config dependency to manage security context in async threads.
Add opencsv library for CSV processing capabilities.
Update JaCoCo coverage exclusion patterns to match the new package structure (courses instead of kitchensink).
Add a JaCoCo check execution with strict coverage rules (100% instruction/branch/line coverage).

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add MONGODB_URI placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add START_QTR placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add END_QTR placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add UCSB_API_KEY placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add COURSE_DATA_STALE_THRESHOLD_MINUTES placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN placeholder to environment configuration sample for Storybook integration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.
Add frontend/strykerTmp to .gitignore to exclude Stryker mutation testing temporary files.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switched the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replaced apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Added Maven as a runtime dependency since it is no longer included in the base image.
Added libstdc++ to satisfy native library requirements for the new environment.
Added git to the image to support build steps requiring version control information.
Upgraded Node.js installation from version 12 to version 20 using nvm to match modern frontend requirements.
Configured the build context to copy the entire project directory including git metadata for the build process.
Set the PRODUCTION environment variable to true to enable production-specific build profiles.
Updated the Maven build command to use the production profile and skip tests during the Docker build phase.
Defined a specific entrypoint to run the generated JAR file instead of defaulting to a bash shell.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project from 'demo-spring-react-kitchensink' to 'proj-courses' and update the description to reflect the CMPSC 156 legacy code project.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title to '# proj-courses' and updated intro text to describe 'Courses Search'.

README.md.general_idea: Replace old Storybook and Heroku deployment links with new Dokku production and QA links for the current and previous semester teams.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced Storybook links with a table of Dokku URLs for prod/qa and W24 teams.

README.md.general_idea: Simplify the OAuth setup instructions by referencing a dedicated documentation file instead of listing steps inline.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced detailed Google Console steps with a link to `docs/oauth.md` and an error screenshot.

README.md.general_idea: Clarify the local development setup instructions with code blocks and troubleshooting tips for frontend/backend synchronization.
README.md.human_impl: Added code blocks for `mvn` and `npm` commands and added notes about blank pages and frontend connection errors.

README.md.general_idea: Add specific instructions for deploying and configuring the application on Dokku, including environment variables.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '# Getting Started on Dokku' with `dokku config:set` commands and PRODUCTION variable notes.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to access the Swagger UI for API endpoints.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '# Accessing swagger' with the localhost URL.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to access the H2 database console locally and on Dokku.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '# Accessing Database Console' with links to localhost and Dokku docs.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to run partial and full Pitest mutation coverage tests.
README.md.human_impl: Added section '## Partial pitest runs' with `mvn pitest:mutationCoverage` examples.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect a change in project identity or purpose.

frontend/.eslintrc.json.general_idea: Add 'react-app/jest' to the extends array to enable Jest-specific linting rules for test files.
Disable the 'testing-library/no-node-access' rule to allow direct DOM node access in tests.

frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Add storybook log files to the frontend gitignore to prevent committing debug artifacts.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Convert Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default syntax.
Update glob patterns to match Storybook 8 conventions, removing .mdx specific pattern and adding .mjs support.
Add the new Storybook 8 onboarding addon to the configuration.
Add Chromatic integration addon for visual testing.
Add the interactions addon for user flow testing.
Add the remix-react-router addon to support React Router v6+ in stories.
Add the queryparams addon to manage URL query parameters in stories.
Explicitly define the webpack5 framework configuration required by Storybook 8.
Configure static directories to serve public assets in Storybook 8.
Remove custom webpack plugin for failing on warnings, likely replaced by stricter build tools or no longer needed.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.human_impl: Removed webpackFinal function and WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning import

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Integrate msw-storybook-addon to enable API mocking in Storybook stories.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: import { initialize, mswLoader } from 'msw-storybook-addon'; initialize(); loaders: [mswLoader]

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add react-toastify to provide visual feedback for navigation events in Storybook.
Implement a decorator that shows a toast notification when a story attempts to navigate away from the root path.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: useEffect(() => { if (location.pathname !== "/") { toast("Would navigate to: " + location.pathname); } }, [location]);

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Allow stories to opt-out of the default MemoryRouter wrapper via a suppressMemoryRouter argument.
Update Storybook preview parameters to use the modern controls matchers syntax and remove deprecated actions regex.
Refactor the preview configuration to use the standard default export object pattern for Storybook 8 compatibility.

frontend/README.md.general_idea: Replaced generic Create React App boilerplate documentation with project-specific commands and directory structure explanations.
frontend/README.md.human_impl: Replaced '# Getting Started with Create React App' and 'Available Scripts' with custom tables for 'Commands' and 'Directory structures'.

frontend/README.md.general_idea: Removed outdated links to external Create React App documentation sections that are no longer relevant or maintained.
frontend/README.md.human_impl: Deleted sections like 'Code Splitting', 'Analyzing the Bundle Size', and 'Deployment' which previously linked to facebook.github.io.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Migrated package-lock.json from lockfileVersion 1 to 3 to align with modern npm standards and Node.js 20 environment.
Updated project name and version in the lockfile root to reflect the current state of the frontend application.
Restructured dependency definitions from the legacy flat 'dependencies' object to the new 'packages' map with explicit 'node_modules' paths.
Added explicit engine constraint to enforce Node.js v20.17.0, ensuring compatibility with the target runtime environment.
Updated core frontend dependencies like React, Bootstrap, and Axios to their latest stable versions compatible with the new stack.
Upgraded Storybook and its associated addons to version 8 to support new UI patterns and fix compatibility issues.
Updated testing libraries including Jest, Testing Library, and MSW to their latest versions for improved test reliability.
Updated Webpack and Babel plugins to versions compatible with the new Node.js and React ecosystem.
